meta.title: The future is hypersonic: An interview with Hermeus COO Skyler Shuford
meta.description:
Sandboxx News editor in chief and AirPower host Alex Hollings sat down with Skyler Shuford, COO of Hermeus, to talk about the aviation firm's plans to develop Mach 5 passenger aircraft and its implications for the future of defense. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
